description:
Wire the interp into the same Runtime as the JIT. spawn/send/receive in interp call into runtime.rs FFI (spawn_via_current_runtime, send_via_current_runtime, fz_receive_attempt). Subsumes fz-ul4.19.8.

## Acceptance

- `# paths: jit, interp` on concurrency_ping_pong.fz.
- fz-ul4.19.8 closes.
title: ir_interp_v2: spawn/send/receive — concurrency_ping_pong.fz
